name: normalization: the Azure boundary maps an Advisor finding into the plugin-standard schema with source native-azure and source_api azure-advisor
command: printf '{"schema_version":"1.0","platform":"azure","route":"azure-boundary","selected_option":{"option_id":"opt-balanced","build_requirements":["encryption_at_rest"]},"iac_targets":["bicep"],"build_units":["encryption_at_rest"],"recommendations":[],"native_review_ref":null}' > h.json && printf '{"review_ref":"r","recommendations":[{"id":"SEC-1","title":"Enable encryption at rest","pillar":"security","severity":"HIGH"}]}' > n.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"/commands/azure-boundary.sh --handoff h.json --native-response n.json --out o.json && node -e 'const b=require("./o.json");const r=b.normalized.recommendations[0];process.exit(b.source_api==="azure-advisor"&&r.source==="native-azure"&&r.grounding==="grounded"?0:1)' && echo azure-normalized-grounded 1>&2
